background.finding: No VitaminC/FEVER/RTE/MNLI/SNLI-style file exists in the repository. All schema-plausible candidates found by Stage43-A are synthetic/controlled probes (Stage10/13/14/15/31/34/35, controlled_v5), not naturalistic external evidence.
background.conclusion: Stage43-B cannot honestly proceed until a naturalistic external claim/evidence/label source is added to the repository or supplied by the user.

preferred_source_order.source: EpistemicBERT VitaminC confident-error or labeled claim-evidence set
Small manually curated external validation set
preferred_source_order.condition: only if labels are independently assigned and not generated by ContraMamba

converter.purpose: Converts a user-supplied naturalistic claim/evidence/label dataset into the ContraMamba Stage43 external evaluation schema.
converter.usage_restriction: The converter only prepares evaluation files. Converted output must not be used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design.

stage43b_evaluation_plan.action: Evaluate Stage39-C safe_structured_v2 on the converted external validation file
constraints: Do not modify existing Stage39/40/41/42/43-A reports
Do not modify existing data/probe files

do_not: use synthetic Stage34/35 probes as naturalistic external validation
add generated converted data unless an input file is actually provided

leakage_policy: This intake layer (schema + converter) is preparation-only. No conversion was run and no converted data files were generated as part of Stage43-B0, because no external input file was supplied. If and when a naturalistic external source is added or supplied, converted output must remain external-evaluation-only and must never be used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design.
recommendation: Await a genuinely external/naturalistic claim-evidence source (per the preferred source order above) before running scripts/convert_stage43_external_validation.py or any Stage43-B evaluation. No model, training, or evaluator code was modified to produce this plan.
